description_long: This object is a baseball bat with a natural wood grain body and a metallic-looking barrel. The handle is wrapped in a dark, textured grip tape that extends up a portion of the bat, providing a secure hold. The barrel is capped with a metallic section that appears slightly rough and matte, contrasting with the smoother wooden shaft. The bat tapers from a thick barrel to a pointed end at the handle, typical of traditional baseball bats. There are no visible logos, markings, or decorative graphics on the barrel or handle. The overall appearance suggests a sturdy, functional bat suitable for recreational or street use.
description: A wooden baseball bat with a metallic barrel and a dark, textured grip tape on the handle. The bat is unmarked and has a natural, rugged look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the wood grain, metallic barrel, and grip tape wrapping.
description_view_1: End-on view of the barrel, showing the rounded metallic cap and the thickness of the bat at this end.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, displaying the continuous wood grain, metallic barrel, and grip tape, similar to view 0.
description_view_3: Handle-end view, focusing on the pointed tip and the detailed wrapping of the grip tape.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The grip tape is dark gray to black, with a rough, matte texture and a spiral wrapping style. No visible designs or logos are present.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is rounded, metallic gray, and appears to be made of the same material as the barrel, with a slightly rough, matte finish and no visible logos or markings.
